docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE S. WYNNS DBA GOLDEN GATE ASSET RECOVERY ON OCT-02-2018 - IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY ASSIGNEE OF JUDGMENT. HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN DENIED PETITION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NON APPEARANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD, TERRANCE AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS, LEON
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $446.22 ACCRUED INTEREST, $75.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS, LEON
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ATLAS, LEON HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD, TERRANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATLAS, LEON $498.00 PRINCIPAL, $461.30 INTEREST, $15.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $974.70, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FOR CASE # 758223. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON JULY 18, 1996. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
